hero.art_prompt: Nikhil, a 28 year old Indian man in smart-casual, energetic and confident, sketching a business idea on a clean board, modern startup space, aspirational and driven.

panels.narration: Nikhil was already good at building ideas at work.
panels.dialogue: I had ideas, but no playbook.
panels.img_prompt: Nikhil, 28, enthusiastically sketching a business idea on a clean whiteboard, driven and creative, modern startup space.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I build a real business?
panels.img_prompt: Nikhil looking thoughtful, wondering how to turn his idea into a real, fundable business, laptop open, tidy workspace.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Entrepreneurship and Leadership.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Nikhil's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Entrepreneurship and Leadership, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Nikhil enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Nikhil confidently starting his first venture creation lesson on a laptop, notebook and business plan beside him, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Entrepreneurship and Leadership
points: Master the real craft: venture creation, business planning, fundraising and leadership.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Nikhil Rao
testimonials.quote: I had ideas but no playbook. This MBA gave me the framework to actually build.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning business planning and fundraising made my venture real, not just a dream.

testimonials.name: Arun Nair
testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI let me learn to build a business while still earning.

testimonials.name: Sara Thomas
testimonials.quote: A recognised MBA plus real founder skills gave me the confidence to launch.
